description.ko: 영원한 네온의 빛이 디지털 지하 세계의 그림자를 가리는 하이테크 대도시로 빠져들어 보세요. 크롬과 빛으로 정의된 미래형 디스토피아에 대한 숨 막히는 비전입니다.
description.en: Immerse yourself in a high-tech metropolis where the glow of eternal neon masks the shadows of a digital underworld. A breathtaking vision of a futuristic dystopia defined by chrome and light.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a sprawling cyberpunk megacity at night, rain-slicked asphalt reflecting vibrant cyan and magenta neon signs, soaring skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, flying vehicles weaving through dense urban fog, intricate metallic architecture, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, moody atmosphere, NEON-V aesthetic.
